PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:USERPROFILE\\.gradle","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Pub\\Cache","C:\\geofauna\\geofauna_app\\build","C:\\geofauna\\geofauna_app\\android\\.gradle","$env:USERPROFILE\\.gradle\\caches","$env:USERPROFILE\\.gradle\\.tmp"\); foreach\($p in $paths\){ if\(Test-Path $p\){ $s=\(Get-ChildItem $p -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum; "{0,10:N2} MB  {1}" -f \($s/1MB\),$p } else { "    \(no existe\)  $p" } })
